parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('Normalize Input').first().json.source_url, formats: ['markdown', 'links'], onlyMainContent: true, waitFor: 5000 }) }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a grant research analyst. Extract structured metadata from a grant program webpage. Return a single JSON object with these fields:

- grant_term_start: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or null
- grant_term_end: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or null
- is_multiyear: boolean or null
- available_funding: number (total program funding in USD) or null
- max_award: number (per-grant maximum in USD) or null
- match_required: boolean or null
- reporting_required: boolean or null
- application_url: URL string or null
- important_dates: array of { label: string, date: string (YYYY-MM-DD), description: string }
  Examples: application deadline, LOI deadline, info session, award notification, grant start, grant end
- resources: array of { label: string, url: string, description: string }
  Examples: FAQ page, eligibility guide, webinar recording, program guidelines
- downloads: array of { label: string, url: string, description: string }
  Examples: application PDF, budget template, program guidelines PDF
- summary: string (1-2 sentence summary of the grant program)

Only include data that is explicitly stated. Do not guess. Use null for unknown fields. Return ONLY valid JSON.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ run_id: $('Normalize Input').first().json.run_id || 'unknown', workflow: 'grant_enrich', status: 'error', entity_type: 'grant', entity_id: $('Normalize Input').first().json.entity_id || 'unknown', source_url: $('Normalize Input').first().json.source_url || '', scrape: { ok: false, bytes: 0 }, enrichment: {}, error: { code: 'VALIDATION_FAILED', message: String($('Normalize Input').first().json.error?.message || 'Invalid input').slice(0, 500) }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
